speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bas ek gehra sadma aur panic hai jo mujhe duba raha hai
text: Aankhon ke aage bas andhera chha gaya hai... main khet ki meid par baitha hoon aur samajh nahi aa raha mere aas paas kya ho raha hai. Dimaag ekdum sunn pad gaya hai, saans ruk rahi hai... bas ek gehra sadma aur panic hai jo mujhe duba raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Address mild risk with normalising line, then mirror the feeling of emotional overwhelm without asking for the stressor yet.
text: Aisa ghabra jana aur andhera chha jana bilkul swabhavik hai jab dimaag ekdum sunn pad jaye. Tumhe is waqt bahut bechaini gher rahi hai, aur main sun rahi hoon ki yeh sadma tumhe andar tak hila raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bas ek gehra sadma aur panic hai jo mujhe duba raha hai
text: Haan bitiya... main phone haath mein liye wahi rone laga hoon khet mein. Mera poora shareer kaanp raha hai aur bas ek gehra sadma aur panic hai jo mujhe duba raha hai, jaise zameen phat jayegi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the physical sensation and duration of the panic to deepen exploration.
text: Yeh ghabrahat ka bojh is pal mein itna bhaari mehsoos ho raha hai ki saans lena bhi mushkil ho gaya hai, aur shareer ko sambhalna kathin lag raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kaise sambhalun khud ko? Abhi mobile pe EMI bounce ka message aaya tha, use dekhte hi aisi halat ho gayi meri. Biwi ka ilaaj chal raha hai aur ab yeh nayi musibat.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Gently inquire about the implied fear connected to the newly introduced stressor.
text: Achanak se us message ne aisi bechaini paida kar di... kya is EMI bounce ne kisi aur badi chinta ko jagah de di hai tumhare mann mein?

speaker: Seeker
text: Chinta toh kha rahi hai mujhe. Biwi ke hospital bills ne pehle hi meri saari savings wipe out kar di thi. Ab account ekdum khali pada hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feared consequence of having no money left for survival or future bills.
text: Pura paisa aspatal mein lag jane ke baad, ab aage ka guzara aur aspatal ka kharcha kaise poora hoga, yahi darr kha raha hai tumhe.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bitiya, kheti mein waise bhi kya bacha hai aajkal? Sukha pad jata hai. Upar se pehle se hi kisan credit card ka byaaj chadhta jaa raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the duty frame of managing the farm, debt, and sick wife simultaneously.
text: Ek taraf ghar aur biwi ki dekhbhaal ki zimmedari, aur dusri taraf kheti aur karz ka dabaav... yeh saara pahaad jaisa bojh akele uthana pad raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Akele hi sehna padta hai mard ko apne ghar ke liye, par ab meri himmat toot rahi hai. Pura din bhag-daud karta hoon, nind bhi udh chuki hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Name the hidden exhaustion of enduring this heavy duty alone.
text: Lagta hai itne waqt se biwi ki bimari aur kisan hone ka sara bojh chupchap akele dhote dhote tum andar se poori tarah thak chuke ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thak toh gaya hoon, par gaon mein kisko bataun ki meri jeb khali hai? Izzat ka sawal hai, log bolenge kaisa marad hai jo biwi ka ilaaj nahi kara pa raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge the stigma cue and relational burden with a soft pause, without questioning.
text: Apni pareshani aur thakan ko gaon walo ki nazron aur izzat ke darr se chupana pad raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, chupana bahut bhaari hota hai. Andar hi andar aadmi ghut-ta rehta hai. Is waqt main aage ka rasta nahi soch pa raha, bas dimaag sunn hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate his isolation and helplessness as normal given the systemic crushing weight of rural medical debt.
text: Tumhara yeh akelapan aur sunn ho jana bilkul swabhavik hai. Jab kisaano ke uper bank ke karz aur aspatal ke kharch ka aisa pahaad ek saath padta hai, toh aisi hi majboori lagti hai, par is bimari aur achanak aaye karz mein tumhari koi galti nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bas ek gehra sadma aur panic hai jo mujhe duba raha hai
text: Galti bhale na ho, par karz toh chukana padega. Agar recovery wale khet pe aa gaye toh biradari mein kya munh dikhaunga? Yahi soch ke bas ek gehra sadma aur panic hai jo mujhe duba raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Share a systemic rural anecdote normalizing the hidden burden of debt and izzat.
text: Hamare gaon-dehat mein kisano pe karz ka dabaav aur izzat ka yeh darr bahut aam baat hai—sirf tumhara akele ka nahi, lekin koi is par khul ke bolega nahi kyunki samajh sabko chup rehna sikhata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi keh rahi ho aap, darr ke maare aadmi ghut jata hai. Par is darr ka toh koi ilaaj nahi dikhta. Abhi meri himmat nahi pad rahi ghar jane ki, batao ab kya karoon main?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer 2 small physical grounding options executable immediately in the field.
text: Abhi ke liye aage ka lamba raasta chhod dete hain, bas inme se ek cheez chuno—kya tum abhi meid se uth kar thoda paani pee sakte ho, ya kisi ped ki chhaon mein aaram se 5 minute baith sakte ho?

speaker: Seeker
text: Paani toh laya tha main apne sath lota bhar ke. Meid se uth kar us neem ke ped ke neeche chala jata hoon, dhoop bhi tez hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Guide the step-by-step action to help him physically ground himself.
text: Pehle uth kar us neem ke ped tak jao... phir wahan baith kar aaram se do ghoont paani piyo... bas itna hi aaj ke liye, baaki chinta hum baad mein samjhenge.

speaker: Seeker
text: Chalo, ped ke neeche aakar baith gaya. Paani bhi gale se utra hai abhi. Thodi si saans aayi hai aur kaanpna kam hua hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemic reframe to alleviate his personal shame around financial distress.
text: Medical emergency aur aspatal ke mote kharch aane par kheti ki aamdani se savings ka wipe out hona ek bade system ki kami hai. Yeh koi aisi cheez nahi jisme tum ek mukhiya ke taur par fail ho gaye ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aap thik hi bol rahi hain, hospital bills ne toh yahan ache-achon ki kamar tod di hai... main toh phir bhi do beegha zameen wala chota kisan hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror his realization that even the strongest buckle under medical debt.
text: Ache acho ki kamar toot jati hai jab beemari ka bojh aur kisan ki zimmedari ek sath kandhe par padti hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ji... bhagwan ka shukar hai ki biwi abhi dhire dhire theek ho rahi hai. Par woh bank walon ka EMI wala message abhi bhi dimaag mein chal hi raha hai thoda thoda.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror his ability to see the positive (wife's health) alongside the lingering but smaller fear.
text: Biwi ki sehat behtar hona is waqt sabse bada sukoon hai tumhare liye, bhale hi woh EMI wale message ka darr abhi puri tarah khatam na hua ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kal subah sochta hoon shehar jaa ke bank manager sahab se mil lu. Shayad halat bata kar thoda waqt maang lu kisan credit card ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate his proactive step to handle the bank issue with courage.
text: Yeh ek bahut samajhdaari aur himmat wala kadam hoga ki tum khabar padh kar ghutne ke bajaye khud bank jake unse waqt maangne ki koshish kar rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Himmat toh karni padegi. Rone se EMI toh nahi bhari jayegi na. Jo hona tha ho gaya, ab jo thoda sa rasta bacha hai uspe hi aage badhna hoga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror his return to the duty of a capable head of the household.
text: Ek ghar ke mukhiya aur mehnatkash kisan ke taur par tumne apni zimmedari ko fir se thaam liya hai aur aage ka sochna shuru kar diya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Zimmedari toh nibhani padti hai bitiya. Ab ghar ki taraf jata hoon, biwi akeli pareshan ho rahi hogi ki aaj khet pe itni der kyu ho gayi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Highlight his deep care and relational focus returning to the foreground.
text: Tumhara dhyaan apne gham se hat kar seedha apni biwi ki fikar par jaana dikhata hai ki tumhare andar unke liye kitna gehra pyaar aur parwah hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Parwah hi toh hai us pagli ki jiske liye main din raat mitti mein mila rehta hoon. Bas kabhi kabhi notification ya bank ke naam se saansein upar neeche hone lagti hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reiterate that the fear is specific to the consequence of debt, not a lack of strength.
text: Us achanak aane wale darr ko samajhna bahut asaan hai, kyunki us message mein tumhari fikar chupi hoti hai ki aage ghar aur ilaaj kaise chalega.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bas ek gehra sadma aur panic hai jo mujhe duba raha hai
text: Sahi kaha aapne. Par ab lag raha hai ki main kal wahan jaa kar sambhal lunga. Pata nahi shuru mein aisa kyun laga ki bas ek gehra sadma aur panic hai jo mujhe duba raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect on his shift from feeling drowned to feeling capable.
text: Jab bojh achanak badhta hai toh ghabrahat asar karti hi hai, par lagta hai ki ab tum us darr se nikal kar khud par phirse bharosa mehsoos kar rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan bitiya, bharosa toh karna hoga khud par. Aapne meri baat itne dhyan se suni, uske liye bahut shukriya. Chalta hoon ab.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Close with a warm validation of his resilience and an open door.
text: Tumhari is nai himmat aur khade hone ki taqat ko dekh kar mujhe bhi bahut achha laga, hamesha yaad rakhna ki is lambi ladaai mein tum akele nahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: is emotional flooding mein mujhe koi raasta nahi dikh raha

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the overwhelming feeling of suffocation and mental blankness without rushing to identify the cause.
text: Jab dimaag ekdum blank ho jata hai aur achanak se ghutan mehsoos hoti hai, toh sach mein aisa lagta hai jaise har taraf se raste band ho gaye hain...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: is emotional flooding mein mujhe koi raasta nahi dikh raha
text: Haan, bilkul andhera lag raha hai. Bas andar hi andar kaanp raha hoon main. Kisi se baat karne ki himmat bhi nahi ho rahi, bas is emotional flooding mein mujhe koi raasta nahi dikh raha ki aage kya hone wala hai mere sath.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the duration and isolation of holding onto this heavy dread.
text: Na kisi se kuch keh paana aur andar hi andar is bhayankar darr ko bardasht karte rehna, ye bojh kafi waqt se tumhare andar ikattha ho raha hoga...

speaker: Seeker
text: Aaj subah bank ka message aaya EMI bounce hone ka... Hospital ke bhaari karz mein sab chala gaya tha, mujhe laga tha ab kist nahi bachegi. Wo notification dekh kar main poori tarah toot gaya hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Highlighting the feared consequence of the sudden realization that the financial burden is not over.
text: Hospital ke itne bade kharche ke baad jab achanak se EMI bounce ka notification dikha, toh aage ke halaat ka darr ekdum se haavi ho gaya lagta hai...

speaker: Seeker

strategy_intent: Stigma protocol applied: mirroring the social fear gently and pausing.
text: Gaon aur biradari ki nazron mein izzat kam hone ka darr, is bojh ko aur bhi bhaari kar raha hai...

speaker: Seeker

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Framing the Seeker's actions as fulfilling a deep family duty despite the sacrifice.
text: Tumne apne parivar ko bachane ke liye apna sab kuch daaw par laga diya, apni aakhri zameen tak de di ek zimmedar insaan ki tarah...

speaker: Seeker
text: Zimmedari toh nibha li, par ab mere paas kuch bacha hi nahi hai. Khaali haath reh gaya hoon aur bank wale ab tang karenge. Main kisi ko shakal dikhane layak nahi raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Prompting the Seeker to explore their internal narrative surrounding the fear of losing face.
text: Aise akele baith kar jab ye shakal na dikha paane ka khayal satata hai, toh tum khud ko is baare mein kya bolte ho?

speaker: Seeker
text: Yahi lagta hai ki main ek nakara insaan hoon. Apne logo ki nazron mein gir gaya hoon. Pata nahi is zillat se kaise bahar niklunga. Dimaag phir se blank ho raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Naming the deep exhaustion that comes from silently carrying shame and financial duty.
text: Lagta hai 'log kya kahenge' aur is pure karz ko akele chupchap sehne ki wajah se ek bahut gehra exhaustion aa gaya hai tumhare andar, jahan ab aage umeed karna bhi thaka deta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul sahi baat hai. Thak gaya hoon main andar se. Har din ye bojh dho kar chalna ki bahar sab theek dikhana hai, aur andar hi andar jalna. Kisi ko pata bhi nahi hai meri sachi haalat ka.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalizing the Seeker's exhaustion and separating their self-worth from the healthcare debt crisis.
text: Bina kisi ko bataye, itne bade hospital debt aur EMI ka tension akele handle karna kisi ko bhi tod sakta hai. Tumhari thakan aur ye ghutan poori tarah jayaz hai, ye medical system ke kharche ki wajah se hai, tumhari kisi kami ki wajah se nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Lekin gaon ka samaj toh mujhe failure hi maanega na. Meri jagah koi aur samajhdaar hota toh shayad aur zameen khareed leta, maine toh jo bachi thi wo bhi ganwa di.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Providing a brief cultural systemic anecdote to reduce isolation and normalize the hidden struggle of breadwinners.
text: Hamare samaj mein jab ek ghar ka bada aisi financial mushkil mein phansta hai toh wo akele hi sehta hai — sirf tumhara akele ka ye darr nahi hai, lekin koi ispe khul ke bolega nahi kyunki biradari mein izzat jane ka stigma bohut bada hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sach kaha aapne. Sab chup rehte hain aur akele ghut te rehte hain. Main bhi wahi kar raha hoon. Lekin ab aage kya? Aise chalta raha toh main bilkul khatam ho jaunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the Seeker's emerging desire to break out of the silent suffocation.
text: Is ghutan mein bhi ab andar se ek himmat aa rahi hai jo is chup chaap sehne wale daur se bahar nikalna chahti hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: is emotional flooding mein mujhe koi raasta nahi dikh raha
text: Kyunki ab sahan nahi hota. Mujhe is darr aur sharam se bahar nikalna hai. Par samajh nahi aa raha ki bank walon ko kaise deal karun bina gaon mein tamasha hue, is emotional flooding mein mujhe koi raasta nahi dikh raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering small, actionable steps to break the overwhelming freeze and gain control over the immediate worry.
text: Abhi itne bade pahad ko ek sath nahi dekhna hai. Do aasan option hain: ya toh ek jagah shanti se baith kar ek glass paani piyo dimaag ko thehraav dene ke liye, ya phir ek paper par sirf bank ki is mahine ki kist ka hisaab likh lo taki andhere mein ghabrahat na ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: is emotional flooding mein mujhe koi raasta nahi dikh raha
text: Main abhi paper par kist ka amount likh leta hoon. Hawa mein sochne se ye darr aur bada lag raha tha, waise bhi is emotional flooding mein mujhe koi raasta nahi dikh raha tha. Likhne se shayad sachai samne aaye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Guiding the Seeker step-by-step through writing down the immediate debt to ground them.
text: Pehle ek copy aur pen nikal lo... phir sirf jo is mahine ki EMI bachi hai uska exact amount likho us par... bas itna hi aaj ke liye, uske aage ka koi aur saal ka hisaab nahi karna abhi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Likh liya maine. Wo amount utna bada nahi hai jitna dimaag mein chal raha tha, par gaon mein biradari ko pata chala toh meri naak kat jayegi. Yahi darr satata hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframing the debt as a structural burden caused by a medical emergency rather than a personal failure of honor.
text: Gaanv aur biradari ke izzat ke paimane aksar aam aadmi ke medical struggles ko ignore kar dete hain. Ye karz ek health emergency ki wajah se hua hai, ye koi personal failure nahi hai balki ek structural bojh hai jo aam parivaron par aata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ye baat toh hai. Hospital walon ne jitna bill banaya, uske chakkar mein mujhe achanak sab bechna pada apni family ke liye. Isme meri niyat toh kharab nahi thi kabhi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Highlighting the Seeker's pure intention and prioritization of family duty over personal wealth.
text: Tumhari niyat sirf apne parivar ki jaan bachane ki thi, aur us farz ke aage tumne apne kisi nuksaan ya izzat ki parwah nahi ki...

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating the Seeker's courage in overcoming shame and recognizing their own rightful actions.
text: Ye jo tum khud ke haq mein bol rahe ho aur us sharam ko hata kar apni sachai dekh pa rahe ho, ye sach mein bohut himmat ki baat hai. Tumne bilkul sahi kaha, isme sharam ki koi bhi baat nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Lekin jab bank ka aadmi gaon mein EMI bounce ke liye aayega, toh logo ki batein sunna thoda muskhil toh hoga. Main us chiz ke liye mental tor par kaisa taiyar rahun?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Guiding the Seeker to find their internal anchor against external judgment.
text: Jab wo log sawal karenge ya baatein banayenge, toh tum khud ko us akele waqt mein sabse zyada kya yaad dilana chahoge apni sachi koshish ke bare mein?

speaker: Seeker
text: Main khud ko yahi yaad dilaunga ki zameen bech kar maine apno ko bachaya hai. Maine koi shauk ke liye karz nahi liya. Agar biradari nahi samajhti, toh na samjhe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the Seeker's strong relational values triumphing over superficial social pressure.

speaker: Seeker

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the shift from the initial intense dread to newfound clarity.
text: Wo jo ek dum se darr ne poori tarah jhakad liya tha aur ghutan ho rahi thi shuru mein, ab uski jagah ek thehrav aur clarity aa rahi hai tumhare andar...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, ab mujhe pehle jaisi ghabrahat nahi hai. Main kal hi subah bank jakar branch manager se baat karunga ki EMI restructure kar dein.

speaker: Seeker

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: rona ruk hi nahi raha
text: Haan, raat ko neend nahi aati yeh soch kar ki subah sahukaar phir gaali dega. Bas karz ki sochna aur ghabrana reh gaya hai, rona ruk hi nahi raha mera akele mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using a question after consecutive restatements to probe how they cope with the relentless nighttime fear and stress.
text: Din aur raat bas ek hi fikr aur darr mein beet rahe hain tumhare. Jab yeh sahukaar aur karz ki chinta raat ko itni zyada ho jati hai ki neend ud jaye, tab tum khud ko is akelepan se kaise nikalte ho?

speaker: Seeker
text: Kahan nikal pata hoon... bas chupchap khaat par pada rehta hoon mitti ko dekhte hue. Kisi ko bata bhi nahi sakta panchayat mein ki main itna toot chuka hoon, mard hoke rounga toh log kamzor samjhenge.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Addressing the stigma cue softly by paraphrasing the fear of being perceived as weak by the village.
text: Andar se tootne ke bawajood bahar se mazboot mard banne ka natak karna padta hai taaki biradari wale koi ungli na uthaye...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: rona ruk hi nahi raha
text: Sach much, yeh natak meri jaan le raha hai. Aisa lagta hai mehnat ka koi mol hi nahi bacha. Sabar rakhne ko bolte hain sab, par sabar se pet thodi bharta hai, isliye rona ruk hi nahi raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the deep exhaustion that comes from the endless struggle, financial burden, and pretending to be strong.
text: Lagta hai is natak ko din raat jeete jeete aur bojh uthate uthate tum poori tarah se thak chuke ho, aur ab akele is darr aur karz ka saamana karna bohot bhari pad raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thak toh gaya hoon yaar. Umar nikal gayi is khet mein mehnat karte, fasal ugate, aur aakhir mein kya bacha mere paas? Sirf sahukaar ki gaaliyan aur karz.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating the pain of unrewarded hard work and separating their core identity as a farmer from the situation.
text: Zindagi bhar mitti ki sewa karke jab badle mein sirf karz aur takleef mile, toh dukh aur bebasi hona bilkul laazmi hai. Tumhara kisan hona aur mehnat karna tumhari sachhi taqat hai, yeh aspatal ka kharcha aur EMI bounce tumhari mehnat aur mardangi tay nahi karte.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aap sahi keh rahe hain, par gaon mein log kahan samajhte hain ye baatein. Wahan toh jispe karz chadha hai, woh bas ek nishana ban jata hai taanon ka.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Sharing a brief systemic anecdote to normalise the issue of medical debt in rural communities.
text: Gaon aur dehat mein yeh achanak aayi beemari aur karz mein phasna bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, kayi kisan is bojh tale dab jate hain, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki izzat aur panchayat ka darr sabko chup kara deta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi baat hai bhai. Bohot ghar barbaad hue hain aspatal ke kharche mein gaon mein. Ab pata nahi humara khet bachega ya nilam ho jayega sahukaar ke haathon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the deep-seated fear of losing their land, using the duration/history lens to honor the weight of the land.
text: Itni mehnat se, salon se seench kar jodi hui apni zameen ko aise nilam hote dekhne ka darr andar ek alag hi bechaini aur dar paida kar raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: rona ruk hi nahi raha
text: Ghabrahat toh wahi khakar ja rahi hai mujhe. Thodi der pehle lag raha tha rona ruk hi nahi raha tha, par aise haath pe haath rakh ke bhi nahi baith sakta. Ab batao kya karoon aage ka, thoda himmat toh karna padega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering small, immediate grounding exercises related to their environment to help settle their nerves before making plans.
text: Tumhara yeh faisla himmat wala hai bhai. Abhi apna dimaag shant karne ke liye hum kuch chota sa kar sakte hain. Ya toh tum wahin khet ki mitti ko thodi der haath mein lekar shanti se lamba saans le sakte ho, ya phir paas ke kisi ped ki chhanv mein thodi der baith sakte ho. Konsa theek lag raha hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Main bas wahin apne khet ke ek ped ke neeche baith kar thodi der shant hone ki koshish karta hoon. Shayad himmat wapas aaye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walking the Seeker step-by-step through the selected grounding exercise to provide immediate relief.
text: Pehle yeh karo… aaram se us ped ke niche baith jao… phir lamba saans lo aur bas khet ki mitti ko aur hawa ko mehsoos karo… bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Baith gaya hoon. Hawa toh thandi chal rahi hai yahan. Dimaag ka bojh halka lag raha hai abhi baat karte karte.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Providing a systemic reframe to shift the blame of the medical expense spiral away from personal failure.
text: Yeh mehsoos karna bahut zaroori hai dimaag shant karne ke liye. Yaad rakhna ki mehnge aspatal aur bimari ka bojh kisi ko bhi karz mein duba sakta hai, yeh vyavastha ki kharabi hai, tumhari kheti ya imaandari ki haar nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kehte hain aap. Bimari ne hi sari jama poonji khayi hai. Meri kheti me toh koi kami nahi chodi maine fasal ugane mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating their dedication to their duty and confirming that the circumstance was beyond their control.
text: Apne kisan dharm aur kheti ko tumne poori imaandari se nibhaya, aur jo yeh aspatal ka kharcha aaya, woh tumhare bas se bilkul bahar tha.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: rona ruk hi nahi raha
text: Haan, lekin abhi sahukaar ka bhi toh kuch karna padega. Aaj toh main ghabra kar bhaag aaya aur rona ruk hi nahi raha tha, par kal thanda dimaag rakh kar sarpanch ji se milta hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the shift from being trapped in fear today to being ready to take practical steps tomorrow.
text: Aaj ka din bhale hi darr mein beeta ho, lekin kal subah uth kar apne haq ke liye aage badhne ka aur samna karne ka khayal aana, waqt ke sath wapas aati taqat ko dikhata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sarkari bank mein mera kisan credit card hai. Panchayat mein agar baat uthe, toh shayad kist chukane ke liye thoda aur samay mil jaye sahukaar se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the return of hope and courage as the Seeker plans a viable financial strategy.
text: Lagta hai sarkari scheme aur sarpanch se madad maangne ka raasta soch kar tumhare andar woh khoyi hui umeed aur kisan wali taqat wapas aa rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Umeed aur taqat toh rakhni padegi. Agar main toot gaya toh chote bacchon ka kya hoga? Kal sawere jaunga panchayat.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the relational motivation and love for children that fuels their courage.
text: Bacchon ke mukh aur unke aage ke bhavishya ka khayal hi tumhe kal subah uth kar sarpanch tak jane ki sachhi takat de raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Wahi meri sabse badi taqat hain ab. Main toh bas ekdum se sahukaar ke darr se sunn pad gaya tha aaj. Ab dimaag thoda theek hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Summarising and reflecting the feared consequence that temporarily shook them versus their returning strength.
text: Us achanak aayi maang aur bezzati hone ke darr ne ek pal ke liye poori tarah hila diya tha, par ab wapas tumhara dimaag shant aur mazboot ho raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan ji. Aapne theek waqt par mujhe sambhal liya aur mitti ki haw ne shant kiya. Kal subah naya din hai, usko kal dekhenge.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating their renewed resilience and readiness to face the next day, bringing closure to the session.
text: Yeh sun kar mujhe bhi badi tasalli hui bhai. Tumhari zameen se judi taqat aur kal naye sire se baat karne ki himmat sach mein tumhara sabse bada bal hai, aur yaad rakhna tum akele nahi ho is ladai mein.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: extreme breakdown mehsus ho raha hai
text: Bhai, andar dimaag mein itna zyada emotional pressure hai ki kuch samajh hi nahi aata. Bas ek extreme breakdown mehsus ho raha hai. Ek gehra despair duba raha hai mujhe har pal, lagta hai jaise sab khatam ho gaya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the intense feeling of being overwhelmed without rushing to the problem.
text: Aisa lag raha hai ki andar ek bohot bada toofan chal raha hai, jo tumhe poori tarah se apni lapet mein le chuka hai aur tumhe duba raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: extreme breakdown mehsus ho raha hai
text: Haan yaar, rona aata hai andar hi andar. Main roz hal pakadne ki koshish karta hoon subah khet mein, par haath kaanpte hain bechaini se. Bas yahi extreme breakdown mehsus ho raha hai lgaatar.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feared consequence of losing the ability to work the fields.
text: Yeh andhera aur rone ka ehsaas itna haavi hai ki tumhara kheti karne ka himmat tootne aur rozi-roti chootne ka darr lagataar badhta ja raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: extreme breakdown mehsus ho raha hai
text: Rozi roti kya bachegi ab? Asli baat ye hai ki bete ki bimari mein saara chit fund ka paisa chala gaya. Ek rupya nahi bacha. Bas ek extreme breakdown mehsus ho raha hai us din se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the duty and role of a father who gave everything for his son.
text: Apne bache ko theek karne ke liye tumne pita hone ka poora farz nibhaya aur saari jama poonji laga di, aur ab yeh khaali pan tumhe poori tarah tod raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: extreme breakdown mehsus ho raha hai
text: Farz toh nibhaya, par uske chakkar mein EMI bounce ho gayi hai ab. Bank wale khet par aa gaye toh kya izzat reh jayegi? Isi baat se dimaag fat raha hai mera.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational fear of facing the bank and losing face in the village.
text: Bank walo ke aamne-samne aane aur zameen par unke aane se gaon mein izzat girne ka yeh darr tumhe aur logon se kaat kar alag kar raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: extreme breakdown mehsus ho raha hai
text: Sahi baat hai, main kisi se madad maangne ke layak bhi nahi bacha ab. Panchayat wale mazaak udayenge ki chit fund mein kyu fas gaya. Extreme breakdown mehsus ho raha hai akele soch soch ke.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Respond to stigma cue with a shorter restatement ending in a soft pause.
text: Logon ke taanon ka yeh darr aur itne waqt ka yeh akelapan...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: extreme breakdown mehsus ho raha hai
text: Pichle chaar mahine se akele hi ghut raha hoon. Ek taraf bete ki dawai, doosri taraf EMI bounce. Thoda bhi aage ka sochta hoon toh dimaag mein emotional pressure itna badh jata hai ki neend nahi aati.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Name the deep exhaustion of carrying these dual burdens alone.
text: Lagta hai ki lagaatar in do bhari zimmedariyon—bete ki sehat aur khet ki izzat—ke beech akele chup kar ladaai ladte hue, tum poori tarah se andar se exhaust ho chuke ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: extreme breakdown mehsus ho raha hai
text: Thak toh gaya hoon maalik. Kabhi kabhi sochta hoon ki dawai kha kar sab khatam kar lu, par fir bete ka chehra saamne aata hai. Mujhe is EMI ne andar se bilkul tod diya hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize the mild risk thought before continuing, then mirror relational anchor.
text: Jab chaaron taraf se raaste band dikhte hain, tab aise khatarnak khayal aana ek akeli ladaai ka hissa ho sakta hai. Par bete ka pyaar tumhe rokta hai, aur kisi aur ka sahara na hone ka ehsaas tumhe lagaatar kamzor kar raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: extreme breakdown mehsus ho raha hai
text: Haan, bas yahi ek umeed judi hai. Warna gaon mein sab jante hain ki chit fund aur bank walo ka jaal kaisa hota hai. Extreme breakdown mehsus ho raha hai inki calls aur notices soch kar.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate that falling into debt for medical reasons is culturally common and not a moral failing.
text: Kisan ki zindagi mein jahan har din ek darr hai, wahan bimari jaisi emergency aane par chit fund ya aise loans ke jaal mein phans jana bohot aam sachai hai. Isme tumhari koi khot ya failure nahi hai, tumne toh sirf niyat saaf rakh ke apne bache ki jaan bachayi.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: extreme breakdown mehsus ho raha hai
text: Bada sukoon milta hai aapse ye sun kar. Sach mein maine koi khet girvi rakh ke aish nahi ki thi. Par is despair se niklu kaise? Thoda shant hona chahta hoon ab.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Share a brief systemic anecdote to normalize the loan trap and stigma.
text: Mere aaspaas bhi aise kayi gaon wale kisan hain, jinhone medical emergency mein khet ya tractor par loan liya aur baad mein EMI trap mein phans gaye—yeh bohot logon ke sath hota hai, lekin gaon ki izzat ke darr se koi khul ke is par bolta nahi.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: extreme breakdown mehsus ho raha hai
text: Matlab main akela kisan nahi hoon is daldal mein? Ye jaan kar mera bojh thoda halka hua hai. Par aage ka kya karoon bhai? Is darr aur is extreme breakdown se nikalne ka koi raasta dikhao.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer 2 simple, immediate options that fit his current constraints and setting.
text: Hum abhi do choti cheezein try kar sakte hain is bechaini ko kam karne ke liye. Pehla, ek glass pani peekar thodi der khet ki khuli hawa mein aaram se baithna. Doosra, baad mein aaram se bank passbook aur medical parchi ek jagah nikal kar rakh lena. Kya sahi lag raha hai abhi ke liye?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: extreme breakdown mehsus ho raha hai
text: Pani peekar thoda ped ki chaanv mein baithne wala theek hai abhi ke liye. Uske baad shaam ko parchi bhi nikal lunga, taki kuch thos hath mein rahe unhe dikhane ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk through the chosen suggestion step-by-step.
text: Pehle aaram se us chaya mein tek lagakar baith jao... phir ek lambi saans lo aur sirf aaj ke aane wale bache hue din par dhyan do... bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: extreme breakdown mehsus ho raha hai
text: Lambi saans li toh dimaag se thoda jhamela kam hua. Par bhai, ek tension rehti hai ki wo bank wale sunenge kya meri bimari wali baat? Unhe toh bas apna byaaj chahiye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide a systemic reframe to shift blame away from his personal failing regarding the bank's harshness.
text: Bank ke karz aur penalty ka poora system is tarah design kiya gaya hai ki kisan hamesha unke dabaav mein rahe. Unka kathor bartaav ek structural neeti ka hissa hai, yeh tumhare samjhane ya tumhari majboori ka personal failure bilkul nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: extreme breakdown mehsus ho raha hai
text: Ye baat aapne badi sahi kahi. Wo kisan ki dard nahi dekhte. Main akele hi bina wajah ghabrata rehta hoon ki meri hi akele ki kismat kharab hai ya meri galti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror his awareness of the duty-based role facing an unfair system.
text: Ek kisan hone ke naate khet mein fasal bachaane ki mehnat aur farz toh tumhe aata hai, par inn kagzon aur bank ke kathor niyamon se akele ladna bilkul naya aur daraane wala kaam lag raha tha.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: extreme breakdown mehsus ho raha hai
text: Bilkul naya bojh hai. Khet ki mitti se nahi darta main, par in papers ke baare me sochte hi ek extreme breakdown mehsus ho raha hai. Dimaag kaam hi nahi karta us taraf.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feeling quality of facing the administrative burden.
text: In kagzi tension aur kanooni chakkaro ka ehsaas paas aate hi, dimaag mein andar se wapas wahi thakan aur bechaini poori tarah sawar hone lagti hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: extreme breakdown mehsus ho raha hai
text: Bechaini toh aati hai, par aapse baat karke ab darr thoda kam lag raha hai. Aapne mujhe gareeb kisan samajh kar taana nahi maara, balki poori izzat se baat suni.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the duration and isolation he faced before feeling heard.
text: Pichle kuch mahinon se jabse tum is daldal mein bilkul akele lad rahe the, kisi ne bhi tumhari is mehnat aur izzat ko waqt dekar nahi samjha tha.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: extreme breakdown mehsus ho raha hai
text: Sach kaha aapne. Ab shaam ko ghar jaake parchi sabse pehle nikalunga. Bete ko bhi thoda time dunga aaram se, bina use apne dil ka darr dikhaye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational shift from hiding in fear to giving love and presence.
text: Apne darr ko side mein rakh kar apne bache ko wapas wahi purana sukoon aur waqt dene ka tumhara yeh faisla, tumhari unse judi gehri taqat dikhata hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: extreme breakdown mehsus ho raha hai
text: Aapki baaton ne himmat de di hai. Kal jaunga manager ke paas. Kam se kam ek sachhi koshish toh karu. Ghar pe baith ke ghutne se accha hai aamne-saamne baat karu.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror his strong duty frame reclaiming agency.
text: Ek mukhiya aur pita hone ke naate, darr ke aage jhukne ki bajaye uska saamna karne ka tumhara yeh farz tumhe wapas ladaai mein khada kar raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: extreme breakdown mehsus ho raha hai
text: Ladaai toh karni hogi bete ke liye. Fasal lagayi hai toh katuanga bhi. Chalta hoon bhai, ab hal utha lu thoda khet ka kaam dekhne.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feared consequence dissolving into acceptance of the challenge.
text: Is ladaai mein ab aage jo bhi anjaam ho, par ab haar maan lene aur sab kuch lut jaane ka wo pehle wala darr tum par haavi nahi ho raha.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: extreme breakdown mehsus ho raha hai
text: Haavi nahi hone dunga abhi. Bohat din seh liya akele akele. Aapka bohot shukriya jo itna time de kar is chote kisan ko suna aur himmat di.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the positive emotional shift from despair to comfort.
text: Jab bhi lagta hai ki koi doosra raasta nahi bacha, toh wahan se umeed ka yeh naya ehsaas aana apne aap mein ek bohot badi rahat deta hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: extreme breakdown mehsus ho raha hai
text: Rahat toh bohot hai bhai. Ab khet ka aakhri chakkar lagakar theek se roti khaunga raat ko aaj, dimaag bohot zyada shant lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the duration of his tough day ending in well-deserved rest.
text: Aaj poore din ki itni bhari ghutan aur takleefon ke baad, aaram se khet mein ghoom kar ek waqt ki roti khaane ka yeh pal tumhare liye sach mein sukoon bhara hoga.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag kaam karna band kar gaya hai
text: Andar ek ajeeb sa gehra sannata mehsus ho raha hai jisme main bas khota ja raha hoon... meri aankhon ke aage andhera chha raha hai aur sharam se gardan jhuki ja rahi hai. Kuch samajh nahi aa raha, bas dimaag kaam karna band kar gaya hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Used Lens F to mirror the emotional overwhelm of the Sequential coping style, adding a warm normalizing line since Seeker expressed losing themselves in the silence.
text: Aise sannate aur sharam ke bojh tale khud ko akela mehsus karna bahut takleefdeh hota hai. Sun ke lag raha hai ki aapke andar ghabrahat ki aisi lehar uth rahi hai jisne aapko poori tarah sunn kar diya hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan bhai, main wahi zameen par sunn hokar baith gaya hoon. Pata nahi main apne wajood ko bacha bhi paunga ya nahi, andar hi andar ghutan aur ek aisi zillat mehsus ho rahi hai jiska koi naam nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the duration and depth of the silent struggle (Lens D), validating the profound sense of humiliation taking over.
text: Bina kisi ko bataye itni badi ghutan ko is lambe sannate mein akele jhelna waqai andar se himmat tod deta hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Asal mein aaj subah bank se call aaya tha. Gaon mein tractor ki kist aur EMI bounce ho gayi hai. Upar se baarish nahi hui toh crop failure bhi jhelna pad raha hai ghar walon ko.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the role and duty frame (Lens B) as the specific financial stressors and family obligations are finally named.
text: Ek taraf kheti barbad hone ka nuksan aur doosri taraf bank ki kist bharne ki itni badi jimmedari aapke kandhon par ek sath aa giri hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Main yahan Surat mein majdoori kar raha hoon, par is baar thikedaar ne paise rok diye toh main remittance bhej nahi pa raha. Ab gaon mein bank wale ghar jayenge toh sabko pata chalega, bas wahi neighborhood shame ka darr khaa raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the feared consequence (Lens E) of societal judgment and the pain of being unable to send money home.
text: Aapki din raat ki mehnat ke baad bhi paise na milne se... yeh darr lagatar bana hua hai ki gaon ki biradari mein aapke parivar ko is beizzati ka samna na karna pad jaye...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag kaam karna band kar gaya hai
text: Is beizzati se toh lagta hai sab kuch khatam ho gaya hai. Kabhi kabhi toh lagg raha hai ki is gehre sannate mein hamesha ke liye doob jaun. Mera toh bas dimaag kaam karna band kar gaya hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Applied moderate risk flag protocol strictly using Lens F to validate the heavy emotional toll, closing with the mandatory safety check.
text: Sab kuch chhod kar is andhere mein gayab ho jane ka khayal aana is hadd todne wali thakan ka asar hai. Yeh sun ke dil bhaari ho gaya. Kya tum abhi theek ho?

speaker: Seeker
text: Main theek hoon bhai, main apni jaan nahi lunga. Peeche gaon mein pariwar hai mera, unko aise bebas nahi chhod sakta. Par koi aage ka rasta bhi toh nahi dikh raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Used a question after two restatements to softly probe what aspect of this trapped situation feels the most paralyzing right now.
text: Parivar ka khayal rakhne ki yeh majbooti waqai dikhti hai aapki baaton mein... par abhi is sab mein sabse zyada daraane wali cheez kaun si lag rahi hai aapko?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag kaam karna band kar gaya hai
text: Sabse daraane wali baat hai ki main ek mard hokar apne ghar walo ko bacha nahi pa raha. Surat mein itni thokar kha raha hoon par kisi ko bata nahi sakta. Sharam se dimaag kaam karna band kar gaya hai bhai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Followed stigma protocol by providing a short restatement (Lens C) that ends in a soft pause to honor the difficulty of the disclosure.
text: Mahaul ki aisi majboori jahan aapko apni takleef aur sachayi sabse chhipani pade...

speaker: Seeker
text: Wahan bolunga toh sab bolenge ki shehar ja kar fail ho gaya. Aur yahan city mein kisi ko farq nahi padta ki ek majdoor bhookha hai ya pareshan. Main dono taraf se akela pad gaya hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflected the core conflict of C8 (Migration) + Sequential, mapping to Grief/Loss of Belonging as the Seeker feels torn between two worlds.
text: Lagta hai ki is kadi mehnat aur kist ke chakkar mein aapne apna shehar aur gaon, dono jagah apna wajood kho diya hai, aur yeh akelepan ka dukh aapko andar se tod raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul bhai, aisa hi mehsus hota hai. Na main wahan ka raha na yahan ka. Bas ek machine ban gaya hoon jo har mahine paise bhejti hai, par is mahine machine bhi bigad gayi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validated the cultural reality of migrant workers being reduced to their remittances, separating his worth from the delayed payment.
text: Apne desh mein jab log ghar chhod kar shehar aate hain kamane, toh sirf ek remittance bhejne wala zariya ban kar reh jana aur apna vajood khona bahut common dard hai. Aapne apni taraf se khoon paseena ek kiya hai, aur thikedar ka paise na dena aapki mehnat ya izzat ko kam nahi karta.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aapki baat thodi dharas de rahi hai. Par gaon ke panchayat aur rishtedaar itna nahi sochte na. Unhe toh bas dikhta hai ki kist bounce hui hai aur beta nakara ho gaya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Disclosed a systemic pattern about migrant life and village expectations to normalize the unseen struggle he is carrying.
text: Migrant majdooron ki zindagi mein bina thikane ki kamai aur uspar gaon ki biradari ke expectations ka yeh mismatch bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi khul ke bolega nahi kyunki sab par ek successful kamau bete ka tag banaye rakhne ka pressure hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha aapne... tag toh banaye rakhna padta hai. Bhai, bas aap ye batao ki ab kya karoon? Kist bharne ka kuch toh rasta nikalna padega na jaldi warna badnami tai hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provided two practical, small-step options for managing the immediate threat of the bank default without adding undue burden.
text: Abhi humare paas aage ke do raaste ho sakte hain. Ek, agar thikedar pe dabaav banane ke liye kisi local union ya sathi ki madad lein, ya doosra, bank officer ko gaon walon ke through ek likhit darkhwast bhejwa dein ki crop failure ki wajah se thoda waqt chahiye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Union wali baat toh theek nahi rahegi, thikedar kaam se nikal dega hamesha ke liye. Bank ko darkhwast dene wala tareeka thoda sahi lag raha hai. Par woh kahan manenge?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walked the Seeker step-by-step through drafting the bank request, breaking it down into a highly manageable task for the day.
text: Pehle ek sadhe paper par asaan bhasha mein kheti barbad hone ka kaaran likhte hain... phir kal uski photo khinch kar gaon mein apne bhai ya dost ko WhatsApp karte hain taaki woh bank mein de aayein... bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Photo WhatsApp toh kar dunga. Lekin yaar, ye loan aur karz ka jaal aam kisan ya majdoor ke liye kitna khatarnak hai. Ek kist idhar-udhar hui aur poori zindagi haraam ho jati hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provided systemic reframe on agricultural and loan systems to further alleviate his internalized shame.
text: Krishi aur farm loans ka pura system hi is tareeke se bana hai ki mausam ka nuksan aur unstable income ka risk kisan ke mathe aata hai, yeh structural failure hai aur aapka zaati nateeja nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh baat samajh toh aati hai, par darr toh phir bhi lagta hai. Pata nahi ghar wale bank ki chitthi dekh kar kya sochenge. Unko bas himmat deni padegi mujhe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the shift back to his sense of duty (Lens B), highlighting his protective nature toward his family despite his own exhaustion.
text: Is mushkil ghadi mein bhi aap apne parivar ki himmat aur hausla banaye rakhne ki apni jimmedari ko pehle rakh rahe hain...

speaker: Seeker
text: Apno ke liye hi toh saari mehnat hai bhai. Agar woh pareshan honge toh mera Surat mein akele mar pakh ke kamane ka kya fayda hoga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the relational core (Lens C) driving his sacrifices, validating his deep care for his family.
text: Parivar ki muskurahat aur unka aaram hi aapki din raat ki mehnat ka sabse bada maksad aur wajah bani hui hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, isliye main subah unko call karke thoda samjhaunga. Kahoonga ki darrne ki zarurat nahi hai, main thikedar se thoda thoda karke advance maang lunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirmed his mature and supportive plan, validating his ability to protect his family even from a distance.
text: Aapka unhe phone karke saari sthiti shaanti se samjhane ka iraada waqai bohot paripakv hai. Is doori mein bhi aap jis tarah unhe support karne ki koshish kar rahe hain, woh kabili-tareef hai aur aapki lagan dikhata hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag kaam karna band kar gaya hai
text: Thoda theek lag raha hai aapse baat karke. Ab dimaag kaam karna band kar gaya hai wali sthiti nahi hai. Dimag halka hua hai thoda.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the reduction of the feared consequence (Lens E) as his mental fog clears into a sense of relief.
text: Woh aane wali badnami aur lachari ka bada darr ab thoda chhatne laga hai, aur uski jagah rasta milne ka sukoon aa raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Sannata abhi gaya nahi hai poori tarah, room abhi bhi akela hi lagta hai, par kam se kam ek clear kaam samne hai kal subah ka.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the time/duration shift (Lens D), acknowledging the contrast between the long dark day and the current quieter night.
text: Is poore din ke itne lambe aur thaka dene wale andhere ke baad, yeh raat thodi si clear aur shant mehsoos ho rahi hogi...

speaker: Seeker
text: Thakan toh bahut zyada hai sach mein. Lagta hai jaise kandhon se do man ka bojh halka hua hai par jism toot raha hai kadi majdoori se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Suggested a highly accessible, comforting physical action for immediate relief before sleep.
text: Ek bada kadam toh soch liya hai, par is thakan ko thoda kam karne ke liye kuch chota sa kar sakte hain kya? Shayad garam pani se muh hath dho lena ya do ghoont paani peena sone se pehle.

speaker: Seeker
text: Garam pani peene ka hi man kar raha hai. Vahi karke bas so jaunga. Kal subah fir mandee jana hai kaam dhoondne.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Closed out the session with a step-by-step breakdown of his nighttime routine to transition him to rest.
text: Bilkul sahi plan socha. Pehle bas ek glass garam paani piyo aur thodi der shanti se baitho... phir aankhein band karke aaram se sone ki koshish karo... aaj ki raat aur aage kuch nahi sochna.
